description: Test jsonb_array_elements set-returning function in FROM clause to expand a JSONB array into rows
name: jsonb_array_elements_from
query_sql:
-- @name GetDocItems
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, elem.value AS item FROM documents, jsonb_array_elements(data->'items') AS elem
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE documents (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data JSONB NOT NULL, metadata JSONB);
